text.title: lb-health-checks Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lb-health-checks as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Wiring /healthz to an endpoint that returns 200 even when the database is down.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The LB keeps the backend in rotation and routes traffic that will fail at the application layer. Users see errors; the LB sees healthy backends. Push for deep health checks via dependency probe that return 503 when dependencies are unavailable.
